{{Infobox character
| name = Asphodel Traveler
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Asphodel Traveler]] is a gray-robed individual with a face covered in scars.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Asphodel Travelers]] must stay calm or their own [[Territory]] will turn on them.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The death of the [[Asphodel Traveler]] released a woman from the grip of the mist.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
